'''sayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bacterially|bacterially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bacterially|bacterially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sayate|sayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sayatesher|sayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sayatesherĂ«m|sayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sayatero|sayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sayateshĂ«|sayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sayateshĂ«m|sayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisayatero|gokisayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisayateshĂ«|gokisayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisayateshĂ«m|gokisayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosayankerom|gosayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosayankeshĂ«|gosayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosayankeshĂ«m|gosayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosayankeya|gosayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sayaterom|sayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sayatemu|sayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sayateya|sayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisayaterom|gokisayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisayatemu|gokisayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisayateya|gokisayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sayayate|sayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sayayatesher|sayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sayayatesherĂ«m|sayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sayayatero|sayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sayayateshĂ«|sayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sayayateshĂ«m|sayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisayayatero|gokisayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisayayateshĂ«|gokisayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisayayateshĂ«m|gokisayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosayayankerom|gosayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosayayankeshĂ«|gosayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosayayankeshĂ«m|gosayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosayayankeya|gosayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sayayaterom|sayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sayayatemu|sayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sayayateya|sayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisayayaterom|gokisayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisayayatemu|gokisayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisayayateya|gokisayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠte|sĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠtesher|sĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠtero|sĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠyĂŠtero|gokisĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠterom|sĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠtemu|sĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠyĂŠteya|sĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠyĂŠterom|gokisĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠyĂŠteya|gokisĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safyafte|safyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safyaftesher|safyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safyaftesherĂ«m|safyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safyaftero|safyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safyafteshĂ«|safyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safyafteshĂ«m|safyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafyaftero|gokisafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafyafteshĂ«|gokisafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafyafteshĂ«m|gokisafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafyafnkerom|gosafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafyafnkeshĂ«|gosafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafyafnkeshĂ«m|gosafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafyafnkeya|gosafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safyafterom|safyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safyaftemu|safyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safyafteya|safyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafyafterom|gokisafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafyaftemu|gokisafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafyafteya|gokisafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
